title: PayPal Stock Is Plummeting After Q1 Report: Is The Turnaround Story Dead
text: PayPal stock plummeted following Q1 2026 earnings despite beating estimates. Non-GAAP EPS of $1.34 beat estimates of $1.27, and revenue of $8.35 billion beat $8.05 billion consensus. Softer Q2 guidance expecting 9% EPS decline weighed heavily on sentiment. Shares traded down 10% shortly after earnings. Analysts questioned whether restructuring would deliver benefits. Strategic reorganization requires near-term investments pressuring margins.
